declared_institution: Université de Constantine — Faculté de Médecine

survey_qa.question: Describe your main area of expertise within Cardiology and what you focus on most in your daily practice.
survey_qa.answer: I work in cardiology doing heart procedures. I see many patients every day with heart problems and treat them. I am very experienced in all areas of cardiology including stents and medications.

survey_qa.question: During your time at Clinique El Azhar, what was a challenging case that shaped your approach to patient care?
survey_qa.answer: I had a patient once with a heart attack and we treated him and he got better. It was very difficult but we managed. I learned to always be careful with heart patients.

survey_qa.question: How would you describe your clinical methodology when a patient presents with a complex cardiac condition?
survey_qa.answer: I check the patient and do tests. Then I decide what treatment to give. I use my 10 years of experience to know what to do in difficult situations.
